user_symptom: a limited subset of customers in US Gov Texas and US Gov Arizona may have experienced intermittent issues or latency connecting to resources hosted in these regions.
root_cause: a recent maintenance event on network infrastructure in the US Gov Texas region led to a shift in network traffic, causing a single network device to become congested.
